outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Trump says he doesn't know if he's winding down or escalating war with Iran as Hormuz deadline looms
outlets.summary: Mixed signals from White House as deadline approaches. Iran rejects ceasefire. Diplomacy exhausted.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Pope Leo's first Easter speech is message of peace to world at war
outlets.summary: Pope Leo XIV uses Easter to deliver call for peace. Urges Trump to find off-ramp.

outlets.name: Washington Times
outlets.headline: Trump says deadline for debilitating strikes on Iran still in place
outlets.summary: Trump firm on Tuesday 8pm ET deadline. Iran must reopen Hormuz or face infrastructure strikes.

outlets.name: Daily Caller
outlets.headline: Israel Strikes Critical Iranian Petrochemical Plant
outlets.summary: Israeli forces hit South Pars, crippling 85% of Iran petrochemical exports.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war live: Trump warns of devastating attacks as deal deadline nears
outlets.summary: Day 39 liveblog. Hegseth: most intense strikes today. Iran rejects ceasefire. Deadline tonight.

outlets.name: Euronews
outlets.headline: Israel strikes Iran's largest petrochemical facility as Trump's Hormuz deadline looms
outlets.summary: Diplomatic efforts intensify as both sides harden positions ahead of Tuesday deadline.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Hegseth: Today highest volume of strikes on Iran yet, Tuesday will be more
outlets.summary: IDF and US forces intensify operations. Israel preparing extensive attack if deadline passes.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Israeli Source: U.S.-Iran Talks Likely to Fail, Israel Prepares Extensive Attack
outlets.summary: Israel doubts diplomacy will succeed. Preparing for escalation if deadline passes.

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: US-Israeli attack targets Iran's Sharif University of Technology
outlets.summary: Iran condemns strike on prestigious academic institution. Vows severe response to Trump threats.

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: Iran rejects ceasefire — demands permanent end to war with guarantees
outlets.summary: Iran demands permanent end to war, not temporary ceasefire. Warns of devastating response if infrastructure struck.
